headline: Oil Hits $100: Three Market Signals Investors Should Watch
summary: A surge in oil prices has triggered reactions across financial markets, from energy stocks to Treasury yields and foreign exchange, suggesting investors are beginning to position for a more inflationary backdrop.

headline: Piper Sandler Assumes Marathon Petroleum at Overweight, Announces Price Target of $343
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst John Royall   assumes Marathon Petroleum (NYSE:MPC) with a Overweight rating and announces Price Target of $343.
